nodes.name: ⏰ Option B - Every 4 Hours
nodes.notes:
OPTION B: Runs every X hours. Change 'hoursInterval' to adjust.
To use this option: Connect this node to 'Read Posts Dataset' and disconnect Option A.

nodes.name: ⏰ Option A - Specific Times
nodes.notes:
OPTION A: Runs at specific hours (9 AM, 1 PM, 6 PM). Click to edit times.
To add/remove times, click the node and modify the intervals.

nodes.name: 📂 Read Posts Dataset
nodes.notes:
Reads your posts.json file from the /data folder.
This file is mounted from your local ./data directory.

nodes.name: 🔄 Get Next Unposted
nodes.notes:
Finds the next post that hasn't been published yet.
Skips posts where 'posted' is true.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Has Image?
nodes.notes:
Checks if the post has an image URL.
If yes → posts with photo. If no → posts text only.

nodes.name: 📸 Post WITH Image
nodes.notes:
Posts to Facebook with an image.
Uses the Facebook Graph API.
Requires Facebook credentials to be configured.

nodes.name: 📝 Post TEXT Only
nodes.notes:
Posts text-only content to Facebook.
No image attached.
Requires Facebook credentials to be configured.

nodes.name: ✅ Mark as Posted
nodes.notes:
Updates posts.json to mark the post as 'posted: true'
so it won't be posted again.

nodes.name: 🏁 Done
nodes.notes: Workflow complete! The post has been published.
